subject: [PATCH v7 07/20] nfsd: add callback encoding and decoding linkages for CB_NOTIFY

2026-06-16.patch_summary: This patch adds callback encoding and decoding linkages for the CB_NOTIFY operation in the NFSv4 protocol. It introduces new functions to encode and decode CB_NOTIFY messages, which will be used by the NFS server to handle client notifications. The encoder is currently a stub, but later patches will flesh out the payload encoding. This change is part of a larger series of patches that aim to improve the NFSv4 implementation in the Linux kernel.
